name: Calcul8²
short_description: Calcul8² is a quick fire number-crunching puzzle game, based on our old friend the calculator and aptly named Calculate Squared.Successor to the popular original, Calcul8. Playable via Mouse, Touch Screen or Keys.
detailed_description:
Calcul8² is a quick fire number-crunching puzzle game, based on our old friend the calculator and aptly named Calculate Squared.


Successor to the popular original, Calcul8. It's the perfect quick pick-up puzzler.

Super easy to pick up, hard to put down.


The aim is simple, reach 0 by tapping buttons to deduct from the goal number shown on the display.

Playable via mouse, touch screen, or keys.

Keys: arrow keys / wasd to select buttons. Space or Enter to tap the buttons.

Do you have what it takes to master the Calcul8tor?


How to play:
  • Play by mouse, touch screen, or keys.
  • Reach 0 by tapping numbers to subtract from your goal number.
  • Press the 'C' button to clear your selected buttons, or 'CE' to choose a new goal.
  • Save / Load using the Disk / Folder icon in the bottom left.
